name: Autonomous Vehicle Miles per Disengagement
description: Average miles driven between safety-critical disengagements for leading autonomous vehicle programs. Based on California DMV disengagement reports and company data. Higher is better.

data_points.source: California DMV AV Disengagement Reports 2015 — Google/Waymo self-driving car project
California DMV AV Disengagement Reports 2016 — Waymo reported 5,128 miles/disengagement
California DMV AV Disengagement Reports 2017 — Waymo reported 5,596 miles/disengagement
California DMV AV Disengagement Reports 2018 — Waymo: 11,017 miles/disengagement
California DMV AV Disengagement Reports 2019 — Waymo: 13,219 miles/disengagement across 1.45M miles
California DMV AV Disengagement Reports 2020 — Waymo: 29,945 miles/disengagement (COVID reduced total miles)
California DMV AV Disengagement Reports 2021 — Waymo continuing improvement; Cruise also reporting
Waymo public safety data — millions of rider-only miles in San Francisco, Phoenix; disengagement metric becoming less meaningful as commercial operations scale (approx estimate)
